title: WSJ: Equifax當年俾人hack咗1.43億個客戶個人資料之前, 已經俾中國間諜偷資料

replies.msg:
Two years before Equifax Inc. stunned the world with the announcement it had been hacked, the credit-reporting company believed it was the victim of another theft, only this time at the hands of Chinese spies, according to people familiar with the matter.....

https://www.wsj.com/articles/before-it-was-hacked-equifax-had-a-different-fear-chinese-spying-1536768305

當年:
最後更新日期：2017-09-08 15:02
美國大型信貸評級機構Equifax在9月7日發表聲明，黑客利用該機構網站上的漏洞攻擊數據庫，事件涉及1.43億個客戶的個人資料外洩，包括：姓名、出生日期、社會安全號碼和駕駛執照號碼。

Equifax在7月29日發現事件　1個月後才公布

Equifax是美國三大信貸評級機構之一。CNN報道，Equifax周四發表聲明表示，這次黑客攻擊在5月中旬至7月中旬發生，洩露的1.43億的個人信息包括姓名、社會安全號碼、出生日期和駕駛執照號碼。他又指，20.9萬個美國信用卡客戶的資訊，和18.2萬人信用報告相關的文件信息也遭洩露。

https://www.hk01.com/%E8%B2%A1%E7%B6%93%E5%BF%AB%E8%A8%8A/117757/%E7%BE%8E%E5%9C%8B%E5%A4%A7%E5%9E%8B%E4%BF%A1%E8%B2%B8%E8%A9%95%E7%B4%9A%E6%A9%9F%E6%A7%8Bequifax%E9%81%AD%E9%BB%91%E5%AE%A2%E5%85%A5%E4%BE%B5-%E6%B6%891-43%E5%84%84%E5%80%8B%E4%BA%BA%E8%B3%87%E6%96%99%E6%B4%A9%E9%9C%B2

嗰時已有人懷疑係中國出手

Was it China? Clues point to state sponsorship of massive Equifax hack
Clues pointing to a state actor in the Equifax breach have emerged

- Once inside, the 'breach crew' handed off control to more sophisticated team
- None of the stolen data has emerged for sale, indicating it is in state hands
- China is a top suspect, but investigators haven't ruled out other possibilities

https://www.dailymail.co.uk/news/article-4937010/Clues-suggest-China-suspect-massive-Equifax-hack.html
